name: connaissance
description: Personal knowledge base CLI + MCP — transcription, summarization, entity organization, synthesis, audit, actions. 43 tools mapping to the connaissance CLI subcommands. Requires the connaissance CLI installed via uv tool install git+https://github.com/guioum/connaissance.

cli_path.title: Chemin vers le binaire connaissance
cli_path.description: Chemin absolu vers le binaire connaissance (laisser vide pour auto-détection dans ~/.local/bin/ ou $PATH). Installer via : uv tool install git+https://github.com/guioum/connaissance
